description: Create a BPMN 2.0 process diagram for the ITIL Incident Management workflow described in '~/Desktop/incident_process_spec.txt'. The diagram must include a 'Service Desk' pool with three lanes ('L1 Support', 'L2 Support', 'Incident Manager') and a separate collapsed 'End User' pool. Incorporate a 'Incident Reported' start event, an 'Incident Closed' end event, and an 'SLA Breach Warning' intermediate timer event attached to the Investigation task. Required tasks include Log Incident, Categorize & Prioritize, Apply Known Fix, Investigate & Diagnose, Implement Resolution, Escalate to Major Incident, and Close Incident. Use exclusive gateways for 'Known Error?', 'L1 Resolvable?', 'Resolved?', and 'Major Incident?'. Connect elements using sequence flows within the Service Desk pool and message flows between the End User and Service Desk. Include a second page named 'Legend' with a brief key. Save the file as '~/Desktop/incident_management.drawio' and export a PNG to '~/Desktop/incident_management.png'.
